'''鈭歝h-ng-j''' ('''changaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunoregulate|immunoregulate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunoregulate|immunoregulate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-ng-j
|-
! Lemma
| changaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:changajithi|changajithi]] || [[word:changajiji|changajiji]] || [[word:changajishi|changajishi]] || [[word:changaji|changaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:changajuthuth|changajuthuth]] || [[word:changajujuj|changajujuj]] || [[word:changajushush|changajushush]] || [[word:changaj|changaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:changajuthu|changajuthu]] || [[word:changajuju|changajuju]] || [[word:changajushu|changajushu]] || [[word:changaju|changaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:changajufuth|changajufuth]] || [[word:changajufuj|changajufuj]] || [[word:changajufush|changajufush]] || [[word:changajuf|changajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:changajethe|changajethe]] || [[word:changajeje|changajeje]] || [[word:changajeshe|changajeshe]] || [[word:changaje|changaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:changajothoth|changajothoth]] || [[word:changajojoj|changajojoj]] || [[word:changajoshosh|changajoshosh]] || [[word:changaj|changaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:changajotho|changajotho]] || [[word:changajojo|changajojo]] || [[word:changajosho|changajosho]] || [[word:changajo|changajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:changajofoth|changajofoth]] || [[word:changajofoj|changajofoj]] || [[word:changajofosh|changajofosh]] || [[word:changajof|changajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:changaj忙th忙|changaj忙th忙]] || [[word:changaj忙j忙|changaj忙j忙]] || [[word:changaj忙sh忙|changaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:changaj忙|changaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:changajathath|changajathath]] || [[word:changajajaj|changajajaj]] || [[word:changajashash|changajashash]] || [[word:changaj|changaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:changajatha|changajatha]] || [[word:changajaja|changajaja]] || [[word:changajasha|changajasha]] || [[word:changaja|changaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:changajafath|changajafath]] || [[word:changajafaj|changajafaj]] || [[word:changajafash|changajafash]] || [[word:changajaf|changajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:changajasha|changajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gochangajasha|gochangajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokichangajasha|gokichangajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:changajn眉sha|changajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gochangajnkn眉sha|gochangajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokichangajn眉sha|gokichangajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:changajsh毛sha|changajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochangajnksh毛sha|gochangajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichangajsh毛sha|gokichangajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:changajrosha|changajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochangajnkrosha|gochangajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichangajrosha|gokichangajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:changajmusha|changajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gochangajnkmusha|gochangajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichangajmusha|gokichangajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:changajsherasha|changajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gochangajnksherasha|gochangajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokichangajsherasha|gokichangajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:changajngasha|changajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gochangajnkngasha|gochangajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokichangajngasha|gokichangajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:changajyasha|changajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gochangajnkyasha|gochangajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokichangajyasha|gokichangajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:changajyamasha|changajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gochangajnkyamasha|gochangajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokichangajyamasha|gokichangajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:changajn眉sh毛sha|changajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochangajnkn眉sh毛sha|gochangajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichangajn眉sh毛sha|gokichangajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:changajn眉rosha|changajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochangajnkn眉rosha|gochangajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichangajn眉rosha|gokichangajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:changajn眉musha|changajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochangajnkn眉musha|gochangajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichangajn眉musha|gokichangajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:changajsh毛n眉sha|changajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochangajnksh毛n眉sha|gochangajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichangajsh毛n眉sha|gokichangajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:changajsh毛rosha|changajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochangajnksh毛rosha|gochangajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichangajsh毛rosha|gokichangajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:changajsh毛musha|changajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochangajnksh毛musha|gochangajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichangajsh毛musha|gokichangajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:changajron眉sha|changajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochangajnkron眉sha|gochangajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichangajron眉sha|gokichangajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:changajrosh毛sha|changajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochangajnkrosh毛sha|gochangajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichangajrosh毛sha|gokichangajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:changajromusha|changajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochangajnkromusha|gochangajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichangajromusha|gokichangajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:changajmun眉sha|changajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gochangajnkmun眉sha|gochangajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokichangajmun眉sha|gokichangajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:changajmush毛sha|changajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gochangajnkmush毛sha|gochangajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokichangajmush毛sha|gokichangajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:changajmurosha|changajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochangajnkmurosha|gochangajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokichangajmurosha|gokichangajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:changaj|changaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ch忙ng忙j|ch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hochangaj|hochangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoch忙ng忙j|hoch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohochangaj|hohochangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoch忙ng忙j|hohoch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉changaj|n眉changaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ch忙ng忙j|n眉ch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉changaj|n眉n眉changaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ch忙ng忙j|n眉n眉ch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂changaj|n茂changaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ch忙ng忙j|n茂ch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂changaj|n茂n茂changaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ch忙ng忙j|n茂n茂ch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luchangaj|luchangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luch忙ng忙j|luch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluchangaj|luluchangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluch忙ng忙j|luluch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lichangaj|lichangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lich忙ng忙j|lich忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilichangaj|lilichangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilich忙ng忙j|lilich忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kochangaj|kochangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koch忙ng忙j|koch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokochangaj|kokochangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoch忙ng忙j|kokoch忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kechangaj|kechangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kech忙ng忙j|kech忙ng忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekechangaj|kekechangaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekech忙ng忙j|kekech忙ng忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
